title: John Rigby
compiled_truth: John Rigby is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-10-01), John Rigby sent 23 and received 117 emails, totalling 140 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kay Mann](people/kay-mann) (23), [Scott Dieball](people/scott-dieball) (16), [Sheila Tweed](people/sheila-tweed) (15), [Pthompson](people/pthompson-akllp) (11), [Ben Jacoby](people/ben-jacoby) (8).
